title: Magagran
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Magagran |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square L-6 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]] |system=[[Magagran system/Legends|Magagran system]] |coordinates=L-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|The Empire can hardly afford to waste its best people. Speaking of which, I have to ask. How did you escape the destruction of the second Death Star?''"
"''For the simple reason that I wasn't there. We of the Royal Guard were periodically rotated to regular stormtrooper units to keep us in fighting trim. I was on Magagran at the time, out in the Outer Rim, helping to break up a Rebel cell.|[[Vilim Disra]] and [[Grodin Tierce (clone)|Grodin Tierce's clone]]|''[[Specter of the Past]]''}} '''Magagran''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. ==History== [[Grodin Tierce]] was involved suppressing a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] uprising at the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The suppression was successful. ==Appearances== *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Halthor sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]]
